greetings.cold: Mr. Gibbons. I've been advised to say nothing interesting.
greetings.neutral: Mr. Gibbons! Good to see the press keeping us honest.
greetings.warm: Gary. No speeches today, I promise.

etiquette.note: Speaks in almost-speeches, deflates in private. When cornered, goes quiet rather than sharp. The umbrella is always with him.
